name: multichat-broadcast
description: Multichat broadcast/forward dispatch — per-employee streaming runner (`runEmployeeInChain`) plus the leading-@-mention forward chain (`runForwardMentionChain`). No Express routes of its own; both helpers are required by `bridge/routes/chat.ts` (the core POST /v1/stream handler) at request time. Disabling this module breaks group chats and @-forwarding but leaves single-employee streaming intact (the chat route only enters these branches when the session has multiple participants or the reply starts with @). Files moved from bridge/routes/chat-{broadcast,forward}.ts.
